issues.message: MDM domains are listed but no MDM schema/entities are provided; MDM must be present and complete.
evidence: mdmDomains only include domainId values: menu, stock, shiftConfig

issues.message: Usecase table references do not match module table ids; inconsistent naming (snake_case/plural) vs declared tableIds.
evidence: usecase escrever/ler uses orders/order_status_history/daily_sales_metrics/top_selling_items_metrics vs tables ids order/orderStatusHistory/dailySalesMetrics/topSellingItemsMetrics
usecase writes shifts/shift_reports/sales_summary_requests vs tables ids shift/shiftReport/salesSummaryRequest

issues.message: Every page must declare navigationRefs array; page definitions omit it.
evidence: pages[*] only include pageInputs and bffCommands, no navigationRefs

issues.message: Workflows with createsTask=true must define taskConfig.
evidence: lowStockAlertWorkflow, orderStatusWorkflow, salesSummaryWorkflow, shiftClosureWorkflow have createsTask=true without taskConfig

issues.message: Metric tables must declare timeColumn/hypertable, dimensions, measures, and updatePolicy(updatedByLayer=layer_3_usecases).
evidence: dailySalesMetrics, topSellingItemsMetrics, lowStockMetrics only specify storageEngine

issues.message: Workflows include metric tables in persistenceRefs but persistenceRefs should reference module tables by id; metrics should be in metricRefs only.
usecase obterPedido has no consumer (no page BFF command, workflow or agent references it)

trace: Validado snapshot de cobertura do fluxo newSolution para o módulo cafeFlow.
Contagens conferidas e regras de validação aplicadas (MDM, tabelas, métricas, páginas, workflows).
Erros encontrados: MDM incompleto, inconsistência de IDs de tabela, navigationRefs ausentes, taskConfig ausente, métricas sem esquema, métricas em persistenceRefs.
Aviso mantido: usecase obterPedido sem consumidor.
